creator: waldeck@gmx.de
text:
After the installation of the binary package I noticed following:

# pkg_info | grep arping
arping-2.05         ARP level "ping" utility

# arping -h
ARPing 1.09, by Thomas Habets <thomas@habets.pp.se>

Fix: 

Package the correct version!
How-To-Repeat: see "Full Description"
